query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: 830 litre of stolen fuel seized, 1 held
articles.description: Chittaurgarh Police and DST seized 830 litres of stolen petrol-diesel from illegal storage in Bhadsoda, arresting Prem Shankar Mali for illegal sale.

articles.title: Euro zone bond yields tick higher along with oil prices after big swings
articles.description: Bond yields in the Euro zone experienced a slight uptick on Wednesday, driven by rising oil prices linked to the U.S.-Iran tensions that threaten energy channels. Germany's 2-year bond yield reacted accordingly, highlighting concerns over future central bank rate increases. Although U.S. inflation reports suggested a decrease, the looming energy price pressures cast uncertainty over economic stability.

articles.title: Wall Street ticks up in premarket, oil prices rise amid Iran threats
articles.description: Stock indexes mostly rose in premarket trading on Wall Street and oil prices rose modestly after Iran threatened to block energy exports.
